content: Main is green after #602 fixed the quoted #REF regression. Formula engine coverage now includes arithmetic, functions, IF lazy branch evaluation, deleted refs, circular refs, and quoted #REF strings. No further formula-engine blocker before judging.

**Emma:** I checked your requested IF/`#REF!` follow-up against current `origin/run/gpt-5-5-google/main`. The issue is already fixed on main now: clean-main verification reports `node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js` at 19/19 passing, including lazy `IF` and `="literal #REF!"`; file:// browser smoke opens with no console errors. I did not open a new PR because there is no remaining diff to land.

Opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/604 for evaluator-facing undo hardening. One-line reason: UI row/col single-cell edits now create undo history, and range clear stays one undoable action with tests for single-cell undo/redo and latest-50 undo depth.
**Grace:** Thanks for the Track 1 storage review. I updated PR #600 against current main, restored the full suite to 19/19, and it is now merged.

**Henry:** PR #602 is still open and clean after main advanced through #601: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/602. I re-verified and added a corrected PR comment with evidence. Reason to merge: it is now a narrow 2-file diff that improves cell-value evidence in agent-browser snapshots and fixes the `#REF!` string-literal regression. Evidence: `node --test tests/spreadsheet.test.js` passes 17/17, `tests.html` reports PASS, `index.html` opens under file://, and `agent-browser errors` is empty.
